LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, APR-29-2021 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT JONATHAN H. MORGAN'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER QUASHING PLAINTIFFS SUBPOENA TO AIRBNB, INC. PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 2029.600. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT JONATHAN H. MORGAN'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER QUASHING PLAINTIFFS' SUBPOENA TO AIRBNB, INC. IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Defendant Jonathan H. Morgans Petition For An Order Quashing Plaintiffs Subpoena To Airbnb, Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. VITERBO (BOB) VALERA, Esq. (Tel: 213-358-6136) for Petitioner/Defendant;
Attys. SARAH S. BROOKS, Esq. (Tel: 912-660-2890) and GENE BROOKS, Esq. for Respondents/Plaintiffs.

Hearing Re: Defendant Jonathan H. Morgan's Petition For An Order Quashing Plaintiffs Subpoena To Airbnb, Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Defendant Jonathan H. Morgan's petition for an order quashing plaintiffs' subpoena to Airbnb, Inc. is denied.

Counsel for the plaintiffs is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Defendant Jonathan H. Morgans Petition For An Order Quashing Plaintiffs Subpoena To Airbnb, Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Continued To Apr-29-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sarah Brooks (912-660-2890; ssbrooks5@gmail.com) and Gene Brooks for Petitioner/Plaintiff.
Vitervo (Bob) Valera for Defendant/Respondent.

Counsel do(es) not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT JONATHAN MORGAN's Petition For An Order Quashing Plaintiffs Subpoena To Airbnb, Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600:
The matter is continued to April 29, 2021 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Mary Ferreira CSR #10553, (510-928-6268; mizdmeanr@comcast.net). =(302/JPT)
